turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, I'm trying to pay my bill but your online portal is giving me an error. Can you help?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm sorry for the inconvenience. Could I get your patient ID so I can check what's outstanding?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I can see your balance of 3,400 rupees. The portal may be under maintenance right now. You can also pay via UPI to our official ID or I can send you a direct payment link.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Payment link would be easier. Send it to my registered number.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sending now. You should receive it in about 2 minutes. Once paid, receipt will be sent automatically.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Got it. Thanks for sorting that quickly.
